mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling on a 3-month basis, discount rates and recession fear both ease, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next 20 trading days. The signal is valid only if the decline is broad enough to imply an active easing cycle rather than noise.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.25 pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not outperform unconditional 20-day returns, or if positive 20-day SPX returns occur in fewer than 55% of rate-cut windows over a rolling 3-year test.

mechanism_narrative: A high federal funds rate above 4.5% tightens financial conditions and compresses equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. This effect is strongest when the policy rate remains elevated for at least one month.
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate episodes fail to show below-baseline 20-day returns, or if the sign is positive in a majority of FEDFUNDS > 4.5% observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income growth and lower earnings expectations, which should reduce S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days when unemployment is already trending higher. The effect is a short-horizon risk-off reaction to labor deterioration.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 pp over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if labor-deterioration triggers are followed by positive 5-day SPX returns more often than negative ones, or if the short-horizon Rank IC is below 0.02 over any 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth above its recent trend indicates resilient demand and lowers recession odds, which supports equities over the next 20 trading days. The mechanism is a positive growth-surprise channel that works only when PAYEMS is accelerating relative to its prior three months.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises by at least 0.3% over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if payroll-acceleration windows do not show higher 20-day SPX returns than non-triggered windows, or if the sign is negative in more than 45% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales and housing starts both improve together, the market reads it as synchronized household demand strength, which lifts S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The effect requires both consumption and interest-sensitive demand to confirm at once.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-sign state of RSAFS and HOUST does not outperform either series alone, or if the combined signal is not positive in at least 55% of matched observations.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous slowdown in GDPC1 and RSAFS signals fading aggregate demand, which should push S&P 500 returns lower over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations are revised down. The mechanism is a medium-lag growth deceleration effect rather than a one-month market reaction.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDP and sales deceleration fails to predict negative 60-day returns, or if the interaction term adds no explanatory power versus single-series specifications.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is rising while CPIAUCSL is stable or falling, markets infer improving real activity without renewed inflation pressure, which supports S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. This is a benign-supply-shock regime in which output growth is not offset by inflation fear.
failure_condition: Reject if rising industrial production with flat-or-lower CPI does not lead to above-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the effect reverses during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-led slowdown, falling HOUST paired with rising UNRATE signals weakening cyclical demand and labor stress, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal is strongest when both series deteriorate together rather than separately.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined housing-and-labor deterioration signal does not forecast lower 20-day returns, or if negative returns are not more frequent than positive returns in triggered windows.
